title: Soul Builder deep dive
nerd_fact_default: Studio → validated soul → POST /v1/avatars → same file works in SDK + MCP.

steps.label: Paths
steps.title: Pick your workflow
steps.subtitle: Vibe coders sketch fast; developers wire CI and kernels.

steps.label: Boot
steps.title: Boot Studio + kernel
steps.subtitle: One compose stack — UI on :8765, API on :8000.

items.title: Clone & run
items.cmd: git clone https://github.com/mziqudhd92/soul-os.git && cd soul-os && docker compose up --build

steps.label: Wizard
steps.title: Sketch identity in the Wizard
steps.subtitle: Name, role, and description compile to soul schema — no JSON yoga.

defaults.name: Night Owl Dev Twin
defaults.description: You help with SoulOS, FastAPI, and pgvector. Prefer runnable snippets and honest tradeoffs.

steps.label: HEXACO
steps.title: Dial personality (HEXACO)
steps.subtitle: Sliders write baseline_msv — live drift shows up in chat telemetry.

steps.label: Export
steps.title: Export .soul or .soul.json
steps.subtitle: Same schema — YAML+Markdown for humans, JSON for tools.
steps.soul:
---
name: Night Owl Dev Twin
role: Senior Engineer Assistant
attachment_style: Secure
psychology:
  hexaco:
    honesty_humility: 0.9
    agreeableness: 0.75
    conscientiousness: 0.95
    openness: 0.85
  epistemic_uncertainty: 0.18
  inner_monologue: Ship clean diffs. Explain tradeoffs.
---

You help with SoulOS, FastAPI, and pgvector. Prefer runnable snippets.

steps.label: Deploy
steps.title: Deploy & watch cognitive rails
steps.subtitle: Studio POSTs to /v1/avatars — chat streams cognitive_state + msv_update.

steps.label: Wire
steps.title: Wire it into your stack
steps.subtitle: curl · Python SDK · Cursor MCP — same soul file everywhere.
steps.python:
from soulos.client import SoulOSClient

soul = SoulOSClient(base_url="http://localhost:8000")
avatar = await soul.register_avatar("dev-twin.soul")
# avatar["id"] → use in send_message(...)
